_note: The recorded EP02 run for topic 'youtube hooks for creators'. Reproduces the video exactly. Run with --live to score your own topic via the heuristic rubric.

my_hook.hook: How to Write Better YouTube Hooks
my_hook.reason: Explains instead of creating tension; no numbers; sounds like every other tutorial title.

hooks.hook: I Built AI That Writes Hooks Better Than I Do — Proof
hooks.reason: Names a competition and demands proof — concrete, niche-breaking claim no one else makes.

hooks.hook: My Hook Scored 8.3% CTR. The AI Wrote It. Here's Why.
hooks.reason: Hard number (8.3% CTR) plus an open loop ('Here's Why').

hooks.hook: I Tested 10 AI-Written Hooks — One Got 3× More Clicks
hooks.reason: Specific test (10, 3×) with a withheld winner.

hooks.hook: How I Used AI to Improve My YouTube Hooks
hooks.reason: Vague 'how I' promise; 'improve' tells the viewer nothing concrete.

hooks.hook: AI vs Human: Who Writes Better YouTube Titles?
hooks.reason: Common versus format; no specific outcome promised.

hooks.hook: The Secret Behind High-CTR YouTube Hooks
hooks.reason: 'Secret' without a concrete payoff reads as clickbait.

hooks.hook: Using AI for YouTube Titles — Full Guide
hooks.reason: 'Full Guide' is an explainer format — low curiosity.

hooks.hook: YouTube Hook Formula That Works in 2024
hooks.reason: 'Formula' is predictable; dated year weakens it.

hooks.hook: AI Tools for YouTube Creators — Hooks Edition
hooks.reason: Saturated listicle angle; the algorithm ignores it.

hooks.hook: How to Write Better YouTube Hooks with AI
hooks.reason: No curiosity gap; completely generic 'how to' format.

winner_brief.hook: I Built AI That Writes Hooks Better Than I Do — Proof
winner_brief.first_line: My hook scored 41. The AI rewrote it to 89. Here is why.
winner_brief.confidence: High — top 3% of analyzed hooks in niche
